docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-19-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNG, KWANG-PILL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNG, KWANG-PILL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MELAMED, ABIGAIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MELAMED, ABIGAIL

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
